sections.title: Dialogue without a ghostspeak amulet equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mmmm, should I be writing this down?

lines.speaker: Grave digger
lines.text: Wooooooo woo! Wooooo woo wooooo woowoowoo woo Woo wooo. Wooooo woo woo? Woooooooooooooooooo!

sections.title: Dialogue with a ghostspeak amulet equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe you should try looking on the bright side of...

sections.title: Using Kharedst's memoirs or book of the dead with History and hearsay included on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you the grave digger this entry mentions?

lines.speaker: Grave digger
lines.text: It seems likely, but I've no recollection of this conversation.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's odd. Did you forget a lot when you...

lines.speaker: Grave digger
lines.text: Died? I guess some memories have faded, but my death still lingers within me.

lines.speaker: Grave digger
lines.text: I was minding my own business while digging a grave when suddenly there was a loud metallic sound.

lines.speaker: Grave digger
lines.text: I was dead... I recall seeing a man a few yards from me, speaking out loud, yet nobody else was around...

lines.speaker: Grave digger
lines.text: I thought I could hear a woman's voice respond, but it was likely just the wind.

lines.speaker: Grave digger
lines.text: I wouldn't think on it too long. I'd just died, my emotions were unbearable.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll let you know if I figure anything out. What's your name?

lines.speaker: Grave digger
lines.text: Please do. My name? It's um... Sander.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Pleased to meet you Sander, I'll see you around.
